Defined the roadmap for an internal AI agent and restructured planning workflows, **cutting planning cycle time 39%** and **growing drill capacity 21%** while communicating priorities and experiment results from IC teams up to executive leadership.

Championed a customer-obsessed discovery process across enterprise drivers of Azure resilience, translating qualitative pain points and quantitative metrics into prioritized roadmap bets that balanced **user experience** with two-sided platform tradeoffs.
